personal.name: Amrutha Varshini
personal.title: Full Stack Developer
personal.subtitle: B.Tech CSE Student | Passionate about building elegant, user-centered web applications

about.bio: I am Amrutha Varshini, a passionate Computer Science and Engineering student with a strong interest in full stack web development. I enjoy crafting clean, efficient code and building solutions that make an impact. I thrive in collaborative environments and am always eager to learn new technologies.
about.objective: To leverage my technical skills in a dynamic organization where I can contribute meaningfully, grow professionally, and build innovative software products that solve real-world problems.

education.description: Pursuing a four-year undergraduate program with a focus on software engineering, data structures, algorithms, and web development.
Completed intermediate education with Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry stream with distinction.
Secured perfect GPA in SSC Board Examinations with outstanding academic performance.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: A multi-page responsive portfolio website built with React.js to showcase skills, projects, certifications, and contact information. Features smooth animations and a clean UI.

projects.title: Student Management System
projects.description: A full stack web application to manage student records including registration, attendance, grades, and reports. Built with React frontend and Express.js backend.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A fully functional e-commerce website with product listing, cart management, and checkout flow. Integrated with a payment gateway and user authentication.
features: Product catalog with search and filters

projects.title: Weather Application
projects.description: A real-time weather forecasting app that fetches live data from OpenWeatherMap API. Displays current conditions and a 5-day forecast with beautiful visuals.

certifications.title: Full Stack Web Development
certifications.description: Comprehensive training in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Node.js, Express, and databases. Completed capstone project.

certifications.title: Data Structures & Algorithms
certifications.description: In-depth certification covering arrays, linked lists, trees, graphs, dynamic programming and complexity analysis.

certifications.title: Python for Everybody
certifications.description: Completed 5-course specialization covering Python fundamentals, web scraping, databases, and data visualization.

certifications.title: AWS Cloud Foundations
certifications.description: Introduction to cloud computing concepts, AWS core services, security, architecture, pricing, and support.

certifications.title: UI/UX Design Fundamentals
certifications.description: Covered user research, wireframing, prototyping with Figma, and design thinking principles.

codingProfiles.description: Solved 300+ problems across Easy, Medium, and Hard categories. Active in weekly and biweekly contests.
Consistent problem solver on GFG with a focus on data structures and algorithmic challenges.
Earned 5-star badges in Problem Solving, Python, and SQL. Active participant in skill certification tests.
Active open source contributor. Repository includes portfolio projects, DSA practice, and mini web apps.
